title: statice humilis var. odorata
intro: Statice humilis var. odorata, also known as fragrant orris, is a perennial herb in the lichen family (Roccellaceae) and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Statice humilis var. odorata include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and aid in digestion. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its availability and use may be limited due to its rarity in cultivation.
